# Joseph Maina — Digital Marketing Specialist

> Portfolio of Joseph Isaac Maina, a Digital Marketing Specialist based in Nairobi, Kenya. SEO, Meta & TikTok Ads, Google Ads, content strategy, social media management, video production, and graphic design.

Joseph Maina helps brands in Kenya and beyond grow online through paid media, organic search, and creative content. The portfolio showcases case studies, campaigns, services, pricing, experience, and a downloadable CV.

## Pages

- [Home](/): Single-page portfolio with all sections.

## Sections (anchors on the home page)

- [About](/#about): Background, skills, education.
- [Video Production](/#videos): Short-form Instagram Reels and campaign videos.
- [Media Buying & Paid Advertising](/#media-buying): Meta, Google, TikTok ad management; KES 500K+/month managed.
- [Graphic Design](/#graphic-design): Gallery of brand and social design work.
- [Social Media Management](/#social-media): Brands managed and campaign projects.
- [Case Studies](/#case-study): Results-driven digital marketing campaigns.
- [Services & Pricing](/#services): Packages and pricing in KES.
- [Experience](/#experience): Roles at Convey Communications, iClear, Nyeri.
- [Testimonials](/#testimonials): Client quotes.
- [FAQ](/#faq): Common questions about digital marketing in Nairobi.
- [Contact](/#contact): Email, phone, social links.
